EXAMPLE_RELIC.description: Whenever you deal [red]Damage[/red], gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. The [rainbow]grimoire[/rainbow] feeds on [jitter]violence[/jitter].
EXAMPLE_RELIC.flavor: A sentient tome with [red]razor-sharp fangs[/red]... It [sine]whispers[/sine] [purple]secrets of protection[/purple] to those brave enough to read.
EXAMPLE_RELIC.title: Fanged Grimoire
